The original version has been optimized by removing unnecessary includes (`#include<cstdio>` , ` # include<string.h>)`, adding inline keyword where possible(` __ attribute__( target_clone s_(" avx ")` ), defining constant values instead of hardcoding them everywhere `(e.g., define N)`).

Additionally,the use of templates was added so we could create generic containers capable storing different types(either integers,floatings points etc.). We've created two helper methods:`pushback()`which addsnewelementstotheendwithoutchangingexistingelements,andanothermethodcalled'find()'thatsearchesfirstoccurrenceindexmatchinggivenkeystartingfromcurrentpositionuntilitreachestheverylastone.`Finally,wecreatedanewfunctionnamed"sort()"withacomparisonoperatorargumentsotherwise,itwilldefaulttolowerthancomparisonbetweenvalues`.
